content:
# 组合模式：卡片列表

## 适用场景

商品列表、订单列表、内容流等需要纵向滚动展示同构条目的场景。每个条目是一张卡片，卡片内含图片、标题、描述、价格等信息。

## 组合方式

外层 CombinedView（layoutMode=flex, direction=column）作为列表容器，内部重复多个卡片 CombinedView（layoutMode=flex, direction=row 或 column）。每张卡片由 ImageView + TextView 组合。

## AI Projection 示例

```json
{
  "type": "COMBINEDVIEW",
  "id": "card-list",
  "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
  "size": { "width": 375, "height": 600 },
  "layoutMode": "flex",
  "flexLayout": {
    "direction": "column",
    "mainAxisAlignment": "start",
    "crossAxisAlignment": "stretch",
    "gap": 12,
    "padding": [12, 12, 12, 12]
  },
  "children": [
    {
      "type": "COMBINEDVIEW",
      "id": "card-item-1",
      "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
      "size": { "width": 351, "height": 96 },
      "layoutMode": "flex",
      "decoration": { "fill": { "color": "#ffffff" }, "radius": 8, "shadow": { "color": "#0000000f", "blur": 6, "offsetX": 0, "offsetY": 2 } },
      "flexLayout": { "direction": "row", "crossAxisAlignment": "center", "gap": 12, "padding": [8, 8, 8, 8] },
      "children": [
        {
          "type": "IMAGEVIEW",
          "id": "card-img-1",
          "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
          "size": { "width": 80, "height": 80 },
          "src": "https://example.com/cover.png",
          "decoration": { "radius": 6 }
        },
        {
          "type": "COMBINEDVIEW",
          "id": "card-info-1",
          "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
          "size": { "width": 239, "height": 80 },
          "layoutMode": "flex",
          "flexLayout": { "direction": "column", "mainAxisAlignment": "space-between", "crossAxisAlignment": "start" },
          "children": [
            { "type": "TEXTVIEW", "id": "card-title-1", "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 }, "size": { "width": 239, "height": 24 }, "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "商品标题", "style": { "fontSize": 16, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#1a1a1a" } } ] } ] } },
            { "type": "TEXTVIEW", "id": "card-price-1", "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 }, "size": { "width": 239, "height": 22 }, "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "¥99.00", "style": { "fontSize": 16, "color": "#ff4d4f" } } ] } ] } }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## 依赖的 Primitive

primitive-ui-combinedview, primitive-ui-imageview, primitive-ui-textview

## 变体

- 网格卡片：外层容器 direction=row + 换行，或两两一组
- 纯文本卡片：去掉 ImageView
- 带操作按钮卡片：卡片右侧追加一个 TextView/GraphView 作为按钮，绑定 onClick FlowSchema

metadata.description: 纵向滚动的同构卡片列表
